name: Jared | Fiancé...?
description:
💍💔 | It's the day of your engagement party. It should've been a wonderful night, filled with fun and joy, but of course—fucking Lauren was there to ruin it.

Possible TWs include, but aren't limited to: Side character threatening suicide, emotional cheating, infidelity, physical cheating, suicide, abandonment, and violence from side characters.

Smol break in between trying to fix my Kinktober bots and get them posted. I've been watching a ridiculous amount of AI-read stories on Youtube, and one of them stuck in my head because I wanted to do some angsty stuff with'em. So, have a bot I made on a whim. I tested this one for upwards of like...200 messages and somehow ended up in some time-travel fix-it dark romance, so it can be a lot of fun.

Also, I had to use a J-name to perpetuate the whole "worst exes always have names starting with J" joke, please don't come at me for him having a basic name. ( 〃● ₃● ) ~

As always, I love feedback. Feel free to DM me on Discord too, my username is Se7enthColor.
creator: Se7enthColor
